mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO tb_notice ( notice_number, notice_title, contract_method, amount, agency, region, demand_agency, notice_date, opening_date, biz_type ) VALUES ( #{noticeNumber}, #{noticeTitle}, #{contractMethod}, #{amount}, #{agency}, #{region}, #{demandAgency}, #{noticeDate}, #{openingDate}, #{bizType} )
mapper.select:
SELECT n.notice_id, n.notice_number, n.notice_title, n.contract_method, n.amount, n.region, n.agency, n.demand_agency, n.notice_date, n.opening_date, n.biz_type, n.created_at, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT e.entity_value SEPARATOR ', ') AS entity_value, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT e.file_name SEPARATOR '| ') AS file_name, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT e.file_url SEPARATOR '| ') AS file_url
FROM tb_notice n
LEFT JOIN tb_notice_entity e ON n.notice_number = e.notice_number
AND n.region LIKE CONCAT('%', #{region}, '%')
AND n.contract_method = #{contractMethod}
AND n.agency = #{agency}
GROUP BY n.notice_id ORDER BY n.created_at DESC
SELECT notice_number, notice_title, contract_method, amount, agency, demand_agency, region, notice_date, opening_date, biz_type FROM tb_notice WHERE notice_number = #{noticeNumber}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_notice_file (notice_number, file_name, file_url) VALUES (#{noticeNumber}, #{fileName}, #{fileUrl})
mapper.select: SELECT file_name AS fileName, file_url AS fileUrl FROM tb_notice_file WHERE notice_number = #{noticeNumber}
